turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: rock on , i'm listening to my favorite band guns and roses .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: no kidding ? i was just listening to the same thing while taking a bath .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: of course . i love to listen to rock .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: man my boxer just peed on the carpet !

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: well i'm into black everything . so at least it wouldn't show on my black carpet .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: ll . i love black too ! guess i was playing my music too loud .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: i've a black car , purse , wear all black .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: maybe i can borrow something as i am packing to visit my dad in china .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: wow , does he live there or work ?

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: live . moved there about ten years ago for a computer tech job .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: have you visited him there before ?

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: once . you cannot even throw a gum wrapper or you can get arrested .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: sounds a bit scary . i ve never been .
